description: This map displays land cover classification for a river system and surrounding areas near Włocławek, Poland, integrating Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Riparian Zones (RZ) data with Urban Atlas (UA) urban centre information. The central feature is a large river (bright blue) flowing through the depicted region. Land cover types, derived from thematic classification, are indicated by various colours: bright blue for water bodies, shades of green for forested and vegetated areas, light yellow/beige for agricultural or sparsely vegetated land, and red/purple shades for urban and artificial areas. A prominent urban centre, identified by the label "UA core region: PL513C1 Wloclawek," is visible along the river, predominantly covered by red/purple artificial surfaces. This urban area is delineated by a dark blue outline, representing the Urban Atlas urban centre boundary. A broader red outline encompasses a larger area, likely indicating the full Riparian Zones Area of Interest or project boundary. The map illustrates the spatial relationship between the river, its riparian zone, and urban development, highlighting the integration of UA data within RZ production. No scale bar, compass, or legend for land cover classes is explicitly visible, but the data likely refers to the 2012 and 2018 reference years as mentioned in the document context.
